title: Origins: Undertale Yellow
description: 9+ new Undertale Yellow origins for the Minecraft Origins mod
body:
# Undertale Yellow Origins
A mod that adds 9+ more origins to the [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) mod, inspired by [Undertale Yellow](https://gamejolt.com/games/UndertaleYellow/136925) characters, including:
- 💛 Clover 
- 🧛 Dalv
- 🕊️ Martlet
- ⭐ Starlo
- ⛩️ Ceroba
- 🦊 Kanako
- 🤖 Axis
- 🟣 Ed
- 🐿️ Mooch

## Special Abilities
List of each characters' abilities, some of which help you out, while others hinder you in your gameplay.
<details>
<summary>💛 Clover</summary>

➕ **Revolver**  
> You can shoot projectiles from your trusty 6-shot revolver.

➕ **Dimensional Satchel**  
> You have access to a satchel with a chest-sized inventory which keep the items on death.

➕ **Mother's Shield**  
> Completely nullify one attack every 15 seconds with a magic shield.  
> Taking any damage while in cooldown resets the cooldown back to 15.

➕ **Air Dash**  
> Every 5 seconds, you can dash in the direction you're looking.

➖ **LV 1**  
> You have 2 less hearts of health than the average human.

➖ **Weak Arms**  
> When not under the effect of a strength potion, you can only mine natural stone if there are at most 2 other natural stone blocks adjacent to it.

➡️ **Looks Armorless**  
> You appear to not wear any armor.

➡️ **Small Size**  
> You are much smaller than the average human, fitting into a 1-block-tall hole while sneaking.

</details>
<details>
<summary>🧛 Dalv</summary>

➕ **Smite**  
> You can summon lightning at any location you can see.

➕ **Lightning Immunity**  
> You are immune to lightning strikes.

➕ **Bat Family**  
> You can create bats from your hands.  
> (They don't do anything)

➕ **Shady Recluse**  
> You get Strength and Speed when not under sunlight.

➕ **Nocturnal**  
> You can slightly see in the dark when not in water.

➖ **Vegetarian**  
> You can't digest any meat.

➖ **Fragile**  
> You have 3 less hearts of health than humans.

</details>
<details>
<summary>🕊️ Martlet</summary>

➡️ **Snowed In**  
> You spawn in a Snowy Taiga biome.

➕ **Royal Guard Equipment**  
> You start with a Royal Guard Guidebook and a pair of durable yellow boots.  
> The Guidebook gives Speed, Resistance, and Strength when held in your main or off hand. This book is kept on death.  
> The leather Snow Boots has Feather Falling IV and is unbreakable.

➕ **Feathered**  
> You are able to fly as if you have an Elytra equipped.  
> Elytra doesn't appear on your player model.

➕ **Air Dash**  
> Every 5 seconds, you can dash in the direction you're looking.

➕ **Woodworker**  
> You craft 6 planks per log instead of 4 with your woodworking skills.

➖ **Scatterbrained**  
> Gain 50% less XP.

➖ **Frail Wings**  
> You break blocks 50% slower than usual when not holding tools.

</details>
<details>
<summary>⭐ Starlo</summary>

➡️ **Wild East**  
> You spawn in a Desert biome.

➡️ **Dual**  
> You deal double projectile damage but also receive double projectile damage.

➕ **Revolver**  
> You can shoot projectiles from your trusty 6-shot revolver.

➕ **Lasso Rod**  
> You start with a durable Lasso Fishing Rod. It's lassoin' time!  
> This lasso is unbreakable.

➖ **Large Appetite**  
> You exhaust much quicker than others, thus requiring you to eat more.

</details>
<details>
<summary>⛩️ Ceroba</summary>

➡️ **Wild East**  
> You spawn in a Desert biome.

➕ **Ketsukane Staff**  
> You start with a durable loyal trident.  
> This staff is kept on death and is unbreakable. It also creates cherry blossom particles when held.

➕ **Air Dash**  
> Every 5 seconds, you can dash in the direction you're looking.

➕ **Velvet Paws**  
> Your footsteps don't cause any vibrations which could otherwise be picked up by nearby lifeforms.

➕ **Berry Lover**  
> As a fox, you are more satiated from berries.

➖ **Fear of Heights**  
> You can't fall asleep above Y = 86.

➖ **Large Appetite**  
> You exhaust much quicker than others, thus requiring you to eat more.

➡️ **Tall Lady**  
> You are taller than the average human, only able to fit into a 2-block-tall hole while crouching.

</details>
<details>
<summary>🦊 Kanako</summary>

➡️ **Wild East**  
> You spawn in a Desert biome.

➕ **Mother's Shield**  
> Completely nullify one attack every 15 seconds with a magic shield.  
> Taking any damage while in cooldown resets the cooldown back to 15.

➕ **Tailwind** 
> You are a little bit quicker on foot than others. 
 
➕ **Air Dash**  
> Every 5 seconds, you can dash in the direction you're looking.

➕ **Berry Lover**  
> As a fox, you are more satiated from berries.

➖ **LV 1**  
> You have 2 less hearts of health than the average human.

➖ **Fear of Heights**  
> You can't fall asleep above Y = 86.

➖ **Large Appetite**  
> You exhaust much quicker than others, thus requiring you to eat more.

➡️ **Looks Armorless**  
> You appear to not wear any armour.

➡️ **Small Size**  
> You are much smaller than the average human, fitting into a 1-block-tall hole while sneaking.

</details>
<details>
<summary>🤖 Axis</summary>

➕ **A "WEAP0n" OF MY OWN_**  
> You start with a very durable shield.  
> The shield is kept on death and is unbreakable.

➡️ **EXP Fuel Gauge**  
> You don't have a usable hunger bar. Food consumed is directly converted to EXP.

➕ **Heal with EXP** 
> You can spend EXP levels to heal hearts. 1 level is converted to 3 hearts.

➖ **Low Power**  
> You have 5 less hearts of health than the average human.

➕ **Upgrade** 
> You can spend 20 levels for an upgrade.  
> Max health will be increased every upgrade, up to +15.
> 
> You have slower movement speed under upgrade level 5.  
> At upgrade levels 10 and 15, you get a movement speed boost.

</details>
<details>
<summary>🟣 Ed</summary>

➡️ **Wild East**  
> You spawn in a Desert biome.

➕ **Command Grab**  
> You can grab entities.  
> Interact with entites while sneaking to grab.  
> Right click again to throw them.

➕ **Strong Arms**  
> You get Strength while not carrying any entity.

➡️ **Bulky**  
> You move slower but have 5 more hearts.

</details>
<details>
<summary>🐿️ Mooch</summary>

➡️ **Wild East**  
> You spawn in a Desert biome.

➕ **Pickpocket**  
> You can steal valuable items from Players and Villagers.  
> Use Right Click while Sneaking with an empty hand to Steal!  
> (It's not real theft, you just spawn an item from a loot table of diamonds, emeralds, gold and iron ingots and nuggets.)

➕ **Dimensional Satchel**  
> You have access to a satchel with a chest-sized inventory which keep the items on death.

➕ **Velvet Paws**  
> Your footsteps don't cause any vibrations which could otherwise be picked up by nearby lifeforms.

➕ **Climbing**  
> You are able to climb up any kind of wall, not just ladders.

➖ **Need for Mobility**  
> You can not wear any heavy armor.  
> (Armor with protection values higher than chainmail)

➖ **Nine Lives**  
> You have 1 less heart of health than humans.

</details>
<details>
<summary>◽ Micro Froggit (Joke Origin)</summary>

➡️ **Micro**  
> You are extremely tiny and you can jump 2 blocks high.

➕ **Acrobatics**  
> You never take fall damage, no matter which height you fall.

➖ **1 HP**  
> You have 1 heart of health, but every source of damage deals half a heart.

</details>

## Dependencies
- [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) 1.13.0-pre.1
- [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
